title: neuracanthus polyacanthus
intro: Neuracanthus polyacanthus, also known as the spike gentian or spiky gentian, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Neuracanthus polyacanthus include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Neuracanthus polyacanthus may include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
